creator: freebsd@igalic.co
text:
This especially doesn't make sense, because of:

install  -m 555 /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/etc/rc.d/

and

===> Staging rc.d startup script(s)

Here's the full output

===>  Staging for gotosocial-g20220209
===>   Generating temporary packing list
===> Creating groups.
===> Creating users
install  -s -m 555 /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial-40be88ec609c9b5352cbb7d38fd70ff7c6a233a5/gotosocial  /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/bin/
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/gotosocial
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial-40be88ec609c9b5352cbb7d38fd70ff7c6a233a5/LICENSE  /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/gotosocial
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial-40be88ec609c9b5352cbb7d38fd70ff7c6a233a5/README.md  /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/share/doc/gotosocial
/bin/mkdir -p /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/etc/gotosocial
install  -m 0644 /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial-40be88ec609c9b5352cbb7d38fd70ff7c6a233a5/example/config.yaml  /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/etc/gotosocial/config.yaml.sample
cp -f -R /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial-40be88ec609c9b5352cbb7d38fd70ff7c6a233a5/web  /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/www/gotosocial/
/bin/rm -f /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/www/gotosocial/gotosocial-styling/.eslintrc.js
/bin/rm -f /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/www/gotosocial/gotosocial-styling/yarn.lock
install  -m 555 /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/gotosocial /usr/ports/net-im/gotosocial/work/stage/usr/local/etc/rc.d/
